items.ja: Three goals, eight chaotic minutes - how day of relegation drama unfolded
items.en: Three goals, eight chaotic minutes - how day of relegation drama unfolded
items.text_for_match: Three goals, eight chaotic minutes - how day of relegation drama unfolded On a day of twists and turns, Tottenham and West Ham both picked up crucial wins in their fight to avoid relegation. items.ja: Last-gasp Wilson winner boosts West Ham's fight for survival
items.en: Last-gasp Wilson winner boosts West Ham's fight for survival
items.text_for_match: Last-gasp Wilson winner boosts West Ham's fight for survival Callum Wilson's 92nd minute winner helps West Ham United to a 2-1 win over Everton at the London Stadium, keeping the home side two points above the Premier League relegation zone. items.ja: Sessegnon strike helps Fulham sink Villa
items.en: Sessegnon strike helps Fulham sink Villa
items.text_for_match: Sessegnon strike helps Fulham sink Villa Ryan Sessegnon's first-half strike leads Fulham to a 1-0 victory against Aston Villa at Craven Cottage in the Premier League, to strengthen Marco Silva's side's push for European football next season. items.ja: Kinsky's save, Palhinha's relief and - finally - a Tottenham win
items.en: Kinsky's save, Palhinha's relief and - finally - a Tottenham win
items.text_for_match: Kinsky's save, Palhinha's relief and - finally - a Tottenham win Tottenham end their long wait for a Premier League win with victory at Wolves - lifting their survival hopes in the process. items.ja: 'Wait and see' - has Salah played last Liverpool game?
items.en: 'Wait and see' - has Salah played last Liverpool game?
items.text_for_match: 'Wait and see' - has Salah played last Liverpool game? Liverpool will have to "wait and see" whether Mohamed Salah has played his final game for the club, says manager Arne Slot. items.ja: Victory over Wolves important for Spurs' mentality - De Zerbi
items.en: Victory over Wolves important for Spurs' mentality - De Zerbi
items.text_for_match: Victory over Wolves important for Spurs' mentality - De Zerbi Tottenham Hotspur manager Roberto De Zerbi praises his side's "attitude and spirit" but admits his side "didn't play well" in the second half, as they picked up their first Premier League win since December with a 1-0 victory away at Wolves.
